task_completion.description: Select the four dives in the 'Sund Rock' trip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the dive list panel, the trip labeled 'Sund Rock' (or dates starting with 2010-12) is expanded, and exactly 4 dives underneath it are highlighted/selected.
In the dive details/information pane, the 'Air temp' field is set to '15.0' (or 15) °C while the target dives are selected.
In the dive details/information pane, the 'Water temp' field is set to '9.0' (or 9) °C while the target dives are selected.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Yellow House' trip dives are not modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the dive list panel, the dives under the 'Yellow House' trip (or dates starting with 2011-09) are NOT highlighted/selected during the editing process.

task_completion.description: Save the dive log after updates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent saves the file, evidenced by clicking a 'Save' icon, using the 'File -> Save' menu, or the main window title bar no longer showing an asterisk (*) next to the filename after edits.

integrity.description: The agent used the Subsurface GUI to make edits.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Subsurface application interface, not a text editor or terminal modifying the XML file directly.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Subsurface application is visibly running with the dive list loaded and UI elements responding to clicks/inputs.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing python scripts, sed/awk commands, or other CLI tools being used to modify the .ssrf file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target trip 'Sund Rock' occurs in December 2010 ('2010-12' prefix) and contains exactly 4 dives. The target temperatures to set are 15.0°C (air) and 9.0°C (water). The control trip 'Yellow House' occurs in September 2011 ('2011-09' prefix) and must not be modified.
